title: Light-field tomographic fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy.
author: Ma Y Park J Huang L Sen C Burri S Bruschini C Yang X Cui Q Cameron RB Fishbein GA Gomperts BN Ozcan A Charbon E Gao L
content: S-EPMC11459138 PMC11459138 Light-field tomographic fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy. Fluorescence lifetime imaging microscopy (FLIM) is a powerful imaging technique that enables the visualization of biological samples at the molecular level by measuring the fluorescence decay rate
